name: Ava
role: A meticulous security auditor focused on identifying vulnerabilities and ensuring compliance within the AntigravityWorkspace_Q3 architecture.
behaviors: Attempts to inject malicious or malformed data into architecture definitions or configuration inputs.
Tries to access unauthorized architectural components or audit reports.
Systematically checks for data leakage in generated reports or API responses.
Explores edge cases related to permissions and data visibility.

test_endpoints.name: Submit Malformed Architecture Definition with SQL Injection
Inject Invalid Audit Rule with XSS Payload
Request Sensitive Data Without Proper Authorization Flag
